```
lsusb

### Post by mojtaba on 2011-04-14
Salam,

Sudani One Connect is automatically detected and work.
mdsl need to configure it using wvdial after running dmesg -c to make sure it is detected..

add code bellow to your wvdial...


[PHP]
[Modem0]
Modem=/dev/ttyUSB0
Baud=115200
SetVolume=0
Dial Command = ATDT
init1=ATZ
init2=AT+CRM=1
FlowControl= Hardware (CRTSCTS)
[Dialer cdma]
Username= sudani
Password= sudani
Phone=#777
Stupid Mode= 1
Inherits = Modem0
[/PHP]

---

### Post by zero-n on 2011-07-23
Hi [abokhadra]("http://ubuntuforums.org/member.php?u=1365851"),

Ubuntu 10.10 & 11.04 comes with usb_modswitch by default but  10.04 is not.
usb_modswitch used ti change your device to usb modem instead of flash driver of CD-ROM.

all you need to do is install usb_modeswitch in your Lucid Ubuntu and use it to change the modem mode then use any PPP connecting program for establishing your connection

---

### Post by zero-n on 2011-08-03
Hi [abokhadra]("http://ubuntuforums.org/member.php?u=1365851"),

Ramdan kreem

Download [this]("http://www.mediafire.com/?aihi6qbx8tg8ooc") package.

Open your terminal and go to the package location.

Install it from your terminal using this command:
```
sudo dpkg -i --force-architecture CrossPlatformUI-V2.1.2-SudaniOne-i386-Ubuntu.deb
```then run the application from:
```
[COLOR=Red]**Applications**[/COLOR] >> [COLOR=Red]**Internet**[/COLOR] >> [COLOR=Red]**SudaniOne**[/COLOR]
```Tell me what happened with you. ;)
